title: Huawei 1.25G SFP optical transceiver, MM, 850nm, 0,55km, 2x LC konektor, DDM
description: The Huawei eSFP-GE-SX-MM850 is a multi-mode 1.25G SFP module with a wavelength of 850nm and two LC connectors for connections up to a distance of 0,55km The LC connectors in the SFP module have UPC polishing
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP For cable type Multi Mode Transmission speed 1 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 850 Distance [km] 0,55 Transfer type 2-fiber Polishing type UPC Tx power [dBm] 9 up to -2,5 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 17 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 20 up to 85 General Compatibility Universal
